title: Rank Collapse, Fixed Points, and the Renormalization Group Structure of MLP Residual Networks
summary: The analogy between deep neural network forward passes and renormalization group (RG) flows has been repeatedly noted in the literature, but existing treatments remain qualitative: depth is described as a coarse-graining scale, attention is likened to a partition function, and representations are said to flow toward fixed points. No existing work has defined a measurable RG order parameter, tested it under controlled variation of the input distribution, or made quantitative predictions that are empirically verified. We study the simplest architecture for which the analogy is tractable: a pure MLP residual stack trained on masked token prediction over synthetic Markov chain sequences with known spectral properties. We report three findings. (i) The effective rank of the residual stream decreases monotonically with depth after training, consistent with progressive integration of irrelevant degrees of freedom. (ii) This rank collapse is selective: it occurs for chains with short correlation length approximately 1 but is absent for chains with long correlation length approximately 7, measured at the position level to control for mean-pooling artifacts. The network preserves exactly the degrees of freedom relevant to the prediction task, the content of the RG relevance criterion. (iii) Inter-layer kernel drift is concentrated at one or two specific transitions, with the remainder of the network near a fixed point, consistent with a discrete fixed-point plateau. Together these findings constitute the first quantitative, position-level evidence that MLP residual networks implement a selective coarse-graining procedure governed by the spectral structure of the input distribution.

AI.tldr: 本文通过对纯 MLP 残差堆栈的经验研究，首次提供了量化的、位置级别的证据，表明 MLP 残差网络实现了选择性的粗粒化过程，其行为受输入分布的谱结构控制。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对深度神经网络与重整化群 (RG) 理论的类比主要停留在定性描述层面，缺乏量化分析。本文旨在超越定性描述，对这种类比进行经验研究。
AI.method: 研究人员使用训练在合成马尔可夫链序列上的纯 MLP 残差堆栈，这些序列具有已知的谱特性，并进行 masked token prediction。他们分析了残差流的有效秩、层间核漂移以及它们与网络深度的关系。
AI.result: 研究发现：(1) 残差流的有效秩随着深度单调递减；(2) 秩坍塌是选择性的，仅发生在具有短相关长度的链上；(3) 层间核漂移集中在特定的层过渡处，其余网络接近固定点。
AI.conclusion: 这些发现支持了 MLP 残差网络实现选择性粗粒化过程的观点，并为大型语言模型中的 RG 计划提供了新的见解。研究人员建议进行扰动衰减实验以提取 RG 缩放指数。

title: Algorithmic and Minimax Complexities in Kernel Bandits
summary: Gaussian-process upper confidence bound (GP-UCB) and decision-estimation-coefficient (DEC) methods may appear, at first sight, to belong to different theories. This paper places the two viewpoints in a common algorithmic-information language for frequentist RKHS bandits. GP-UCB fixes an algorithmic, rather than true, Gaussian-process prior and exploits realized-trajectory complexity together with computational tractability, whereas MAMS optimizes a robust class-wide MAIR/DEC envelope. Through the unified MAIR framework and heterogeneous positive-semidefinite algorithmic priors, we generalize both the GP-UCB analysis and the MAMS algorithm, propose a safeguarded master that combines their advantages, and provide a kernel-bandit construction showing that algorithmic complexity can be more informative than class-wide minimax or DEC certificates in overparameterized models. The resulting message is that algorithmic information and class-wide minimax coefficients answer different questions and can lead to different gaps; kernel bandits provide a clean setting in which this distinction becomes mathematically visible.

AI.tldr: 本文将GP-UCB和DEC方法统一到一个框架下，并提出了一种新的算法，证明了在过参数化模型中，算法信息比类宽最小最大风险或DEC系数更能提供信息。
AI.motivation: 长期以来，GP-UCB和DEC方法被认为是不同的理论，本文旨在将它们统一起来，并探讨它们之间的区别和联系，从而更深入地理解kernel bandits中的信息理论最优性。
AI.method: 本文提出了MAIR框架，利用异构正定算法先验，统一了GP-UCB分析和MAMS算法，并提出了一种safeguarded master算法，结合了它们的优点。通过hub-cloud分离的构造，比较了算法的性能。
AI.result: 研究表明，算法信息和类宽最小最大风险系数回答了不同的问题，并且可以导致不同的差距。在kernel bandits中，这种区别变得数学上清晰可见。safeguarded master算法在结构化真值上表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 本文提供了一个统一的视角来理解kernel bandits中的算法信息和类宽最小最大风险，为进一步研究信息理论最优性提供了新的思路，并澄清了GP-UCB最优性讨论。

title: A Constrained Natural-Language Interface for Variational Multi-Physics Finite Element Simulations in FEniCS
summary: Large language models can reduce the manual effort required to set up finite element simulations, but they introduce reliability risks when generated solver code lies on the critical path. We present a constrained natural-language interface for multi-physics finite element analysis in which the LLM is limited to front-end tasks: parsing prompts into structured JSON, generating Gmsh code only for non-catalog geometries, and using retry feedback for those stages. It never writes FEniCS solver templates, derives weak forms, or writes the numerical solver core. A deterministic dispatcher maps the validated specification to five human-written FEniCS/UFL templates: linear elasticity, hyperelasticity, elastoplasticity, thermo-mechanical coupling, and phase-field fracture. We validate this deterministic template layer against analytical solutions and published 2D/3D benchmarks. Smooth cases reach sub-percent agreement on adequate meshes, while harder nonlinear cases reach the 2-5 percent range. We also evaluate the LLM-facing front end directly. In a 15-prompt parser benchmark, first-pass valid parses were obtained for 9 cases, and all remaining cases were repaired after retry, giving a final valid parse rate of 100.0 percent, 100.0 percent problem-class accuracy, and 97.1 percent field-extraction accuracy. In a 10-case custom-geometry benchmark routed through the real LLM-to-Gmsh path, first-pass and final success were both 90.0 percent, with one unrecovered invalid-geometry failure. These results show that the parser and constrained prompt/validation design are effective on these benchmarks. As an end-to-end demonstration, the system generates and analyzes a 3D elastoplastic L-bracket with a fillet and bolt hole from one natural-language prompt. The contribution is a measured architecture for natural-language-driven variational simulation, not open-ended autonomous code generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种受限的自然语言接口，用于在FEniCS中进行多物理场有限元模拟。该接口将LLM限制在前端任务，避免了LLM直接生成求解器代码带来的可靠性问题。
AI.motivation: 传统的有限元分析工作流程繁琐，且容易出错。大型语言模型(LLM)可以简化设置有限元模拟的工作，但直接生成求解器代码可能导致可靠性问题，因此需要一种更安全的方法。
AI.method: 该系统将用户提示解析为结构化的JSON规范，LLM仅生成非目录几何体的Gmsh代码，并使用重试反馈进行修复。它不生成FEniCS求解器模板、弱形式或数值求解器核心，而是使用预先编写的FEniCS/UFL模板，并通过确定性映射器选择合适的模板。
AI.result: 在两个和三维的分析解和已发表的基准测试中，平滑情况的精度达到亚百分之一，非线性情况的精度在2-5%范围内。LLM前端的解析准确率达到100%，自定义几何形状基准测试的首次成功率和最终成功率均为90%。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提供了一种受限的、可靠的自然语言驱动的变分模拟架构，避免了LLM直接生成求解器代码的风险，并展示了在复杂几何形状（如L形支架）上进行多物理场模拟的能力。

title: Non-linear mechanical field reconstruction coupling recurrent neural networks with physics-informed graph neural networks
summary: Reconstructing local stress fields in heterogeneous microstructures under non-linear, history-dependent loading remains a major computational bottleneck in multi-scale simulations. We propose a coupled LSTM-GNN framework that links the temporal and spatial aspects of local stress field reconstruction. A Long Short-Term Memory network encodes macroscopic stress-strain sequences into a compact hidden state that captures the path-dependent constitutive response, while a physics-informed Graph Neural Network reconstructs the spatially-resolved stress field at each time step. We introduce a relative weighting strategy with linear warm-up to balance the data-driven reconstruction loss and a discrete divergence-based equilibrium penalty. This resolves the scale mismatch that prevents fixed-weight formulations from converging in the elasto-plastic regime. The model is trained on 10,000 non-proportional loading paths applied to a periodic plate-with-a-hole microstructure and von Mises elasto-plasticity. The model achieves three orders of magnitude speedup over finite element simulations and generalizes to loading sequences twice the training length, with 1.9% cumulative error. Because the graph relies on mesh connectivity instead of the specific element type, one trained surrogate can be applied directly without retraining to meshes with different element types and to both coarser and finer resolutions, while in all cases reproducing the high-fidelity quad-element FE field used during training. Indeed, the message passing characteristics inherent to GNN and MeshGraphNet architecture render the model mesh-agnostic. Analysis of the LSTM hidden states suggests a low-dimensional structure related to the internal state variables of the constitutive model.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合LSTM和GNN的框架，用于高效重建非线性材料微结构中的局部应力场，显著加速了多尺度模拟，并具有良好的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统多尺度模拟计算成本高昂，尤其是在考虑非线性材料行为（如塑性）时。为了解决这一问题，需要一种更高效的方法来重建局部应力场。
AI.method: 该方法采用LSTM网络编码宏观应力-应变序列，捕捉路径相关的本构响应；并使用物理信息图神经网络（GNN）重建时空分辨率的应力场。引入了一种相对权重策略，平衡数据驱动的重建损失和基于离散散度的平衡惩罚，以解决尺度不匹配问题。
AI.result: 该模型在10,000条非比例加载路径上训练，实现了比有限元模拟快三个数量级的速度提升，并且能够泛化到训练长度两倍的加载序列，累积误差为1.9%。模型对网格类型和分辨率具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提供了一种高效且通用的局部应力场重建方法，可用于多尺度优化和设计复杂结构材料，尤其是在考虑非线性材料行为时，具有重要的工程应用价值。

title: An adaptive framework for the axisymmetric pulsar magnetosphere using physics-informed Kolmogorov-Arnold networks
summary: The pulsar magnetosphere has only recently been addressed using Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs), by deploying a domain-decomposition approach and treating the separatrix and equatorial current sheet as infinitesimally thin discontinuities. However, this baseline requires extensive manual hyperparameter tuning, achieves limited final accuracy and demands several hours of training. We refine this framework by introducing domain-specific neural architectures based on Kolmogorov-Arnold networks, an automated adaptive training pipeline and a physics-based convergence criterion that eliminate the need for manual calibration. The proposed methodology delivers self-consistent axisymmetric magnetosphere solutions with mean squared errors of the PDE residuals at O(1e-6) in double precision - an improvement of two orders of magnitude over the baseline - while achieving convergence in under 20 minutes in single precision. Importantly, the method reliably resolves stellar radii reduced by up to 80% compared to the baseline, overcoming the severe spatial scale disparities that also challenge traditional solvers. Furthermore, by varying the flux that opens to infinity, we provide a correction to the equation that connects it to the equatorial T-point's position. The complete framework is released as the open-source library PulsarX.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Kolmogorov–Arnold网络（KAN）的自适应框架，用于求解轴对称脉冲星磁ospheres，显著提高了计算效率和精度，并能有效解决空间尺度差异问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于物理信息神经网络（PINN）的脉冲星磁ospheres求解方法存在手动调参多、精度有限、训练时间长等问题，且难以有效解决空间尺度差异。
AI.method: 研究人员引入了基于Kolmogorov–Arnold网络（KAN）的领域特定神经网络架构，并设计了自动化的自适应训练流程和基于物理的收敛判据，取代了手动调参。该框架将偏微分方程（PDE）及其边界条件嵌入到神经网络的损失函数中。
AI.result: 该方法在单精度下实现了小于20分钟的收敛时间，并将PDE残差的均方误差降低到10⁻⁶，比现有方法提高了两个数量级。同时，能够可靠地解析出减小80%的恒星半径，有效解决了空间尺度差异问题，并提供了一个连接到无穷远通量的修正方程。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提供了一种高效、高精度且可自适应的脉冲星磁ospheres求解框架，并将其开源为PulsarX库，为脉冲星磁ospheres的研究提供了新的工具和方法。

title: LLM-Guided Neural Architecture Search for Robust Co-Design of Physical Neural Networks
summary: Deploying neural networks on unconventional hardware demands architectures that co-optimize task accuracy and platform-specific constraints such as energy cost, physical non-idealities, and numerical precision. Existing neural architecture search (NAS) methods are typically tailored to a single hardware family, limiting cross-platform comparison and generalization. We introduce Unconventional Hardware Neural Architecture Search (UH-NAS), a hardware-agnostic, LLM-guided NAS framework that integrates language models as evolutionary operators to co-optimize accuracy and inference energy. By exposing hardware as a swappable backend with per-platform energy models, physical constraints, and non-ideality simulators, UH-NAS enables fair system-level comparisons across various backends without modifying the search algorithm. Tested on optical MZI hardware, UH-NAS discovers more diverse, robust architectures than conventional baselines while outperforming existing LLM-to-NAS approaches. Additional ablations on architecture robustness under non-idealities and the role of system prompts highlight the importance of architecture-hardware co-design for emerging computing platforms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为UH-NAS的LLM引导的神经架构搜索框架，旨在针对非传统硬件进行鲁棒的架构协同设计，同时优化准确率和推理能耗。
AI.motivation: 现有神经架构搜索方法通常针对单一硬件家族，难以进行跨平台比较和泛化。在非传统硬件上，设备非理想特性对性能影响显著，需要更灵活的架构设计方法。
AI.method: UH-NAS将语言模型作为进化算子，集成到硬件感知的神经架构搜索框架中。它通过可互换的后端、能耗模型、物理约束和非理想性模拟器，实现跨异构平台的一致搜索流程，并利用LLM生成的系统提示和硬件知识库引导搜索。
AI.result: 在光子MZI硬件上测试，UH-NAS发现的架构比传统基线更具多样性和鲁棒性，并且优于现有的LLM到NAS方法。实验还表明，系统提示和架构与硬件协同设计对于新兴计算平台至关重要。
AI.conclusion: UH-NAS提供了一种硬件无关的、LLM引导的神经架构搜索方法，能够有效地解决非传统硬件上的架构协同设计问题，为新兴计算平台的设计和优化提供了新的思路。

title: Integrating Out, Twice:The Open-System Case That Neural-Network Ensemble Theory Is Missing
summary: Averaging a neural network over its random parameters and marginalizing a Gaussian sector are the same operation, the Schur complement of the eliminated block, and when that block is closed it returns a covariance and its inverse. That is all a network ensemble produces, the closed case. The open case is missing, and nuclear reaction theory has it worked out. Projecting a scattering problem onto a chosen set of channels, with the rest carrying probability irreversibly to a continuum, leaves a non-Hermitian effective generator that conserves and itemizes exactly what it loses: the nuclear optical model and its generalized optical theorem. I set the two cases side by side using only the moments of a distribution, the algebra of Gaussians, and block inversion, no field theory, and give the closed-case dictionary in full: the neural tangent kernel is the Fisher sensitivity kernel, the infinite-width Gaussian limit is the Gaussian-process emulator, and the lazy-to-feature transition is the validity boundary of a reduced-basis emulator. I then test the open export on a truncated attention map, a token-level transfer operator, and a sparse expert router, and report a mostly negative result. The conserved flux ledger ports wherever openness is genuinely present, but its distinctive content is absent, an artifact of the chosen partition, or pinned near a floor by the training objective, and the operationally useful uncertainty turns out to be epistemic, living in the closed half of the correspondence, not the open one. The negative has a structural reason this note makes precise: the open case needs an eliminated sector with a continuous spectrum and wave-like, not relaxational, dynamics, which mainstream learning's finite or dissipative objects do not supply. This is a note, not a result; its main finding is that negative one, and its value is the map that locates it.

AI.tldr: 本文将神经网络集成理论与核物理中的开放系统理论联系起来，指出当前神经网络集成理论忽略了开放系统的关键特征，并尝试将核物理中的方法应用于神经网络，但结果不尽如人意。
AI.motivation: 神经网络集成理论通常处理的是封闭系统，而现实世界的问题往往是开放系统。本文旨在探讨神经网络集成理论中开放系统的缺失，并借鉴核物理中处理开放系统的有效方法。
AI.method: 作者将神经网络集成和核物理中的费舍巴克投影方法进行类比，利用高斯分布的代数和块反演，构建了封闭系统和开放系统的对应关系。随后，作者尝试将开放系统框架应用于截断的注意力图、token级别的转移算子和稀疏专家路由器等神经网络结构进行测试。
AI.result: 在神经网络上的开放系统测试结果主要为负面。虽然开放性确实存在，但其独特的特性要么是所选划分的伪影，要么是被训练目标固定在较低水平，或者可操作的不确定性只是表征性的，而非开放系统所应有的。
AI.conclusion: 本文指出，神经网络要真正实现开放系统处理，需要具有连续谱和波动动力学而非弛豫动力学的消除扇区，这表明当前主流学习方法在处理开放系统方面存在局限性。本文的主要发现是负面结果，但其价值在于指明了未来研究的方向。

title: Towards Critical Branching Mechanism in Recurrent Neural Networks
summary: Criticality has been proposed as a key organizing principle in biological neural systems, yet its origin and relevance in artificial neural networks remain unclear. We analyze hidden-state dynamics in trained long short-term memory (LSTM) networks and show that small networks near their optimal training epochs (steps) exhibit scale-free avalanche statistics and branching parameters close to unity, indicative of near-critical dynamics, while larger models remain subcritical. To explain the coexistence of subcritical branching with robust $1/f^β$ noise, we introduce a mixture branching process framework that links heterogeneous branching dynamics to long-range temporal correlations. These results identify critical-like behavior in LSTMs as an emergent, capacity-dependent dynamical regime.

AI.tldr: 本研究分析了训练好的LSTM网络中的隐藏状态动态，发现小规模网络表现出接近临界状态的特征，如无标度雪崩统计和接近于1的分支参数，而大规模模型则表现出亚临界状态。研究提出了一种混合分支过程框架来解释亚临界分支与1/fβ噪声的共存。
AI.motivation: 借鉴生物神经系统中的临界性概念，研究旨在探索人工神经网络（特别是LSTM网络）中临界行为的起源和相关性，以及解释其在训练过程中如何产生。
AI.method: 研究人员分析了训练好的LSTM网络中的隐藏状态动态，定义了雪崩事件，并分析了其统计特性，将LSTM雪崩与分支过程建立直接联系。同时，提出了混合分支过程框架。
AI.result: 研究发现，小规模LSTM网络在训练的特定阶段表现出接近临界状态的特征，包括无标度雪崩统计和接近于1的分支参数；而大规模模型则表现出亚临界状态。1/fβ噪声的出现与潜在的分支过程密切相关。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，LSTM网络中的临界行为是一种与容量相关的动态机制，为理解人工神经网络中的临界现象提供了一种新的视角，并为ANN的设计和优化提供了潜在的指导。

title: POPSICLE: Benchmark Datasets for Segmentation and Localization in CryoET
summary: Cryo-electron tomography (cryoET) has emerged as a powerful tool in structural and cellular biology by enabling direct visualization of macromolecular structures within intact cells, thereby linking molecular architecture to cellular organization in a native context. Realizing the full potential of cryoET, however, increasingly depends on advances in computational analysis, particularly machine learning (ML), to interpret its complex and information-rich data. Despite rapid progress, ML development for cryoET remains bottlenecked by the lack of standardized, well-annotated benchmarks. Existing evaluations are typically small, task-specific, and are assembled in isolation, limiting robust comparisons across methods. Here, we present POPSICLE, a benchmark suite for cryoET segmentation and macromolecular localization built from the CryoET Data Portal - an open, ML-ready repository of tomographic data, metadata, and annotations. POPSICLE spans eukaryotic and prokaryotic systems, both purified and fully in situ samples, and dense voxel-wise segmentation as well as sparse localization tasks. Built on a living data resource, it can expand as new datasets and annotations become available. Baseline experiments reveal substantial variation in model rankings across tasks, underscoring the need for benchmarks tailored to the unique characteristics of cryoET rather than evaluation practices adapted from adjacent biomedical imaging domains. POPSICLE thus provides an open and extensible foundation for reproducible ML evaluation in cryoET.

AI.tldr: POPSICLE是一个用于冷冻电镜（cryoET）分割和定位的基准数据集套件，旨在解决当前cryoET机器学习评估缺乏标准化和通用性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的cryoET数据集规模小、任务特定且孤立，限制了机器学习方法之间可靠的比较。缺乏标准基准阻碍了cryoET领域机器学习的发展。
AI.method: POPSICLE从CryoET数据门户构建，包含真核和原核系统、纯化和原位样本，涵盖了密集体素级分割和稀疏定位任务。该基准数据集是一个动态资源，可以随着新数据集和注释的可用性而扩展。
AI.result: 基线实验表明，不同任务的模型排名存在显著差异，强调了需要针对cryoET的独特特性定制基准，而不是采用来自其他生物医学成像领域的评估方法。
AI.conclusion: POPSICLE为cryoET中的可重复的机器学习评估提供了一个开放和可扩展的基础，促进了该领域机器学习研究的进步，并鼓励开发能够跨任务泛化的模型。

title: Flexible Kernels for Protein Property Prediction
summary: Despite its importance to applications in protein design, predicting protein properties like binding affinity and thermostability from sparse experimental data remains a significant challenge. Accordingly, we introduce a class of sequence kernels that exploit evolutionary substitution matrices as well as local linearity and demonstrate that the resulting Gaussian processes provide data-efficient models of protein property landscapes, frequently outperforming alternatives that rely on foundation model embeddings. Furthermore--by learning what are in effect structure-aware substitution matrices--we show that our kernels can readily incorporate structural information from foundation models. We demonstrate that these structure-conditioned kernels are well suited to multi-task learning across multiple protein property landscapes and can decisively outperform local supervised learning methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种灵活的序列核函数，利用进化替代矩阵和局部线性，结合高斯过程进行蛋白质性质预测，在数据效率和多任务学习方面表现优异，并能有效整合结构信息。
AI.motivation: 蛋白质性质预测对于蛋白质设计至关重要，但从稀疏实验数据中准确预测仍然是一个挑战。现有方法在数据效率、不确定性估计和多任务学习方面存在不足。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于高斯过程的序列核函数，该函数利用进化替代矩阵和局部线性，并能学习结构感知的替代矩阵，从而整合结构信息。通过多任务学习，将该方法应用于多个蛋白质性质预测任务。
AI.result: 实验表明，提出的序列核函数在高斯过程框架下，在多个蛋白质性质预测任务中优于依赖于大型基础模型embedding的替代方法。结构条件核函数在多任务学习中表现出色，显著优于局部监督学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的灵活核函数为蛋白质性质预测提供了一种数据高效、具有高质量不确定性估计且适用于多任务学习的有效方法，为蛋白质设计工具箱的构建提供了新的思路。
